acceptance_rule: candidate must tie or beat deck_607 on same real-opponent gate
candidate must not regress the Winota matchup
candidate must preserve or improve miracle/topdeck game frequency
candidate must not cut pressure absorption unless replacing same function

tested.result: 3W/5L/1S, WR 33.33%, Winota 0W/3L
tested.learning: High structural score does not beat deck_607 if the shell overfills engine/ramp and loses pressure response.

tested.swap_or_scope: +Aetherflux Reservoir, +Birgi, +Enlightened Tutor, +Gamble, +Past in Flames, +Storm-Kiln Artist; six cuts from 607
tested.result: 1W/8L/0S, WR 11.11%, Winota 0W/3L
tested.learning: Importing the v7 package as a bundle damages deck_607 execution; does not isolate Birgi.

tested.result: 2W/7L/0S, WR 22.22%, Winota 0W/3L
tested.learning: Molecule Man and The Scarlet Witch are protected plan pieces, not easy cuts.

tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Winota 0W/3L
tested.learning: Penance is coherent, but cutting pressure absorption hurt the pressure matchup.

tested.result: 2W/7L/0S, WR 22.22%, Winota 1W/2L
tested.learning: Lower-curve spell payoff did not convert better than the original high-impact finisher.

tested.swap_or_scope: +Birgi, God of Storytelling // Harnfel, Horn of Bounty; -Bender's Waterskin
tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Winota 1W/2L, miracle games 4/9, topdeck games 2/9
tested.learning: Isolated Birgi sidegrade kept structural intent at 100, but reduced miracle games from 8/9 to 4/9 and topdeck games from 3/9 to 2/9 versus the same deck_607 gate. Bender's Waterskin remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 0W/9L/0S, WR 0.00%, Winota 0W/3L, miracle games 4/9, topdeck games 2/9
tested.learning: Reprieve preserved Molecule Man and the structural intent score, but replacing Tibalt's Trickery removed too much protection/counter leverage. Tibalt's Trickery is now protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: confirmed 21W/51L/0S vs deck_607 30W/41L/1S over 72 games; smoke 8W/16L/0S vs deck_607 6W/18L/0S; Boros Charm resolved 8 and spell-cast/miracle-cast 4/4 in confirmation; Winota 0W/9L vs deck_607 3W/6L
tested.learning: Boros Charm is a real, battle-ready protection card and was exercised, but the confirmed gate reduced wins, topdeck activation, spell-chain volume, and Winota performance. Do not cut Tibalt's Trickery for Boros Charm in the current 607 shell.

tested.result: confirmed 27W/45L/0S vs deck_607 30W/41L/1S over 72 games; smoke 10W/14L/0S vs deck_607 6W/18L/0S; Silence accessed 22/72, drawn 12/72, spell-cast 15, resolved 13; Winota 1W/8L vs deck_607 3W/6L
tested.learning: Silence was exercised enough for the result to matter and still failed the promotion gate. Cheap proactive protection increased some spell volume but reduced topdeck/miracle conversion and did not beat the protected baseline.

tested.result: smoke 4W/20L/0S vs deck_607 6W/18L/0S; Grand Abolisher cost-paid/spell-cast 4 and resolved 3
tested.learning: Grand Abolisher protects a decisive own turn in theory, but this exact non-instant replacement reduced the smoke gate immediately. It should not be confirmed from this slot unless a future runtime or opponent model materially changes.

tested.result: smoke tied 11W/13L/0S vs deck_607 11W/12L/1S over 24 games; Deflecting Palm was exercised in 8 games, spell-cast 6, miracle-cast 1, resolved 8; Winota 1W/2L vs deck_607 2W/1L
tested.learning: Deflecting Palm is battle-ready and did produce real card events, but this same-lane pressure probe did not beat deck_607 and regressed the fast-pressure Winota slice plus miracle/discard-to-top cadence. Do not promote this exact swap in the current 607 shell.

tested.result: confirmed 25W/47L/0S vs deck_607 30W/41L/1S over 72 games; Chaos Warp had events in 17 games, spell-cast 10, miracle-cast 5, resolved/removal-resolved 15; Winota 2W/7L vs deck_607 3W/6L
tested.learning: Chaos Warp is battle-ready and a coherent same-lane removal card, but the confirmed gate lost five wins and regressed Winota, spell-chain volume, topdeck activation, and cost-reduction conversion. Stroke of Midnight remains ahead in the current 607 removal slot.

tested.result: smoke 8W/16L/0S vs deck_607 11W/12L/1S over 24 games; Return the Favor spell-cast/resolved 2; Winota 1W/2L vs deck_607 2W/1L
tested.learning: Return the Favor is a coherent redirect/copy hypothesis, but it ranked below 607 structurally and lost the smoke gate immediately. Its extra copy mode did not offset the lost baseline slot in the current 607 shell.

tested.result: 4W/5L/0S, WR 44.44%, Winota 1W/2L, miracle games 6/9, topdeck games 1/9
tested.learning: Galvanoth was closer than Reprieve and preserved Molecule Man, but replacing Creative Technique still regressed win rate, Winota, miracle frequency, and topdeck frequency. Creative Technique remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Winota 0W/3L, miracle games 6/9, topdeck games 2/9
tested.learning: Ghostly Prison improved the Vivi combat-pressure slice, but cutting High Noon collapsed the Winota and Sisay results and reduced miracle/topdeck frequency. High Noon remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 1W/8L/0S, WR 11.11%, Winota 0W/3L, miracle games 8/9, topdeck games 5/9
tested.learning: Guttersnipe increased topdeck event frequency but did not convert to wins. Replacing Prismari Pianist removed too much board-pressure payoff; Prismari Pianist remains protected until a same-function replacement wins.

tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Winota 0W/3L, miracle games 4/9, topdeck games 2/9
tested.learning: Ashling spiked the short probe but failed the equal gate. The cut improved neither Winota nor the miracle/topdeck cadence, so Storm Herd stays ahead on the current real-opponent package.

tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Vivi 0W/3L, Winota 2W/1L
tested.learning: Underworld Breach produced another short-probe false positive. Losing all three Vivi games while only side-grading the rest confirms that Reforge the Soul still holds the stronger cross-matchup engine slot.

tested.result: 1W/7L/1S, WR 11.11%, Vivi 0W/2L/1S, Winota 0W/3L
tested.learning: Sevinne looked coherent and battle-ready, but the equal gate collapsed immediately in both pressure matchups. Reforge the Soul remains the better engine slot until a same-function replacement actually survives Vivi and Winota.

tested.result: 3W/6L/0S, WR 33.33%, Vivi 2W/1L, Winota 0W/3L
tested.learning: Authority improved the Vivi slice and produced an early Approach line, but zero wins into Winota makes it a metagame sidegrade, not a better main-deck replacement for the current champion shell.

tested.result: 2W/7L/0S, WR 22.22%, Vivi 0W/3L, Winota 1W/2L, miracle games 5/9, topdeck games 0/9
tested.learning: Wheel of Fate looked positive in the wide short probe, but the equal gate collapsed across all three core matchups and completely removed the topdeck setup cadence. Artist's Talent remains ahead in the current draw slot.

tested.result: historical scoped probe 3W/0L/0S; historical equal gate rerun seed42 7W/1L/1S vs deck_607 5W/4L/0S; historical equal gate seed99 2W/7L/0S vs deck_607 1W/8L/0S; current PG247/PG248 rebaseline seed42 g3 tied 4W/5L/0S vs deck_607 4W/5L/0S; current seed99 g3 lost 0W/9L/0S vs deck_607 2W/7L/0S; current aggregate 4W/14L/0S vs deck_607 6W/12L/0S
tested.learning: Squee remains a coherent recursion hypothesis and the runtime proved known graveyard entries and explained upkeep returns, but the current rebaseline no longer proves a deck upgrade. Cutting Insurrection reduced miracle/finisher conversion in the larger current gates, so deck_607 returns to protected baseline and Insurrection is protected until a same-function replacement wins.

leader_follow_up_probes.learning: The first clean priority probe on top of the Squee shell still regressed sharply from the new leader. The Squee champion did not want to trade Pinnacle Monk for Olórin's Searing Light.
The Squee shell punished the Ragavan speed swap immediately. Hit the Mother Lode remains clearly ahead in the current ramp slot.
Reprieve did not preserve the pressure-absorption shell that the Squee champion is using well. Avatar's Wrath remains the stronger protection slot in this shell.

leader_follow_up_probes.result: Wheel of Fate 0W/3L/0S, WR 0.00%; Cool but Rude 2W/1L/0S, WR 66.67%; both below Squee baseline 88.89%
leader_follow_up_probes.learning: The Squee champion still wants Artist's Talent. Wheel collapsed entirely and Cool but Rude improved less often than the baseline deck itself.

leader_follow_up_probes.swap_or_scope: +Ashling, Flame Dancer / +Sand Scout / +Perch Protection; -Emeria's Call // Emeria, Shattered Skyclave
leader_follow_up_probes.result: Ashling 0W/3L/0S, WR 0.00%; Sand Scout 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; Perch Protection 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; all below Squee baseline 88.89%
leader_follow_up_probes.learning: After Squee took the main wincon slot, the remaining priority wincon sidegrades all failed. Emeria's Call stayed ahead as the next best wincon/support slot in the champion shell.

leader_watchlist_probes.swap_or_scope: +Borrowed Knowledge / +Cathartic Reunion / +Dragon's Rage Channeler / +Archivist of Oghma / +Palantir of Orthanc; -Artist's Talent
leader_watchlist_probes.result: Borrowed Knowledge 2W/1L/0S, WR 66.67%; Cathartic Reunion 2W/1L/0S, WR 66.67%; Archivist of Oghma 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; Dragon's Rage Channeler 0W/3L/0S; Palantir of Orthanc 0W/3L/0S
leader_watchlist_probes.learning: The first draw-oriented watchlist batch still could not improve the Squee champion. Artist's Talent stayed ahead as the draw/topdeck glue piece.

leader_watchlist_probes.swap_or_scope: +Gods Willing / +Angel's Grace / +Sejiri Shelter // Sejiri Glacier / +Commander's Plate / +Clever Concealment; -Avatar's Wrath
leader_watchlist_probes.result: Gods Willing 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; Angel's Grace 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; Sejiri Shelter 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; Commander's Plate 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; Clever Concealment 0W/3L/0S
leader_watchlist_probes.learning: The champion shell strongly preferred Avatar's Wrath over the first protection watchlist package. None of those swaps preserved the pressure-defense profile.

leader_watchlist_probes.result: Abrade 1W/2L/0S, WR 33.33%; Erode 0W/3L/0S; Vandalblast 0W/3L/0S; Lightning Bolt 0W/3L/0S; Wear // Tear 0W/3L/0S
leader_watchlist_probes.learning: The first removal watchlist batch failed hard on the Squee shell. Pinnacle Monk remained better than the tested removal sidegrades.
